creator: murray@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Your patch has been committed.  Please don't re-wrap paragraphs in the 
future so that we can keep the whitespace changes to a minimum and 
make it easier for the translation teams.  The first paragraph in your 
diff only changes a few words but by rewrapping the paragraph it is 
difficult to see exactly what change was made.  Thanks for the submission!
